content: Transfer your data into {{productName}} from {{organizationName}} Workspace, Google Workspace, or Nextcloud.

comment.text: This is a description displayed in an empty state view. It informs the user about the ability to migrate data from other platforms into DocSpace. `{{productName}}` will be replaced with "ONLYOFFICE DocSpace" and `{{organizationName}}` will be replaced with the user's organization name.
